text:
Each cow produces 5 liters of milk per day.  
The farmer has 3 cows, so he currently gets:  
3 cows × 5 liters/cow = 15 liters per day.

He wants to produce 25 liters per day.  
He needs:  
25 liters ÷ 5 liters/cow = 5 cows in total.

He already has 3 cows, so he needs:  
5 cows - 3 cows = 2 more cows.

#### 2
